case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CAROLINA BORGES ALMEIDA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALMEIDA, CAROLINA BORGES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2014
